response.overview: ​"Directed and produced by Ali Boubacar Bonkano, this visual project provides an unfiltered look at the professional realities within the fashion industry. The film captures the internal drive, creative process, and personal journey of Bonkano as he navigates a competitive market, asserting his commitment to his legacy and professional growth in the fashion world.
response.tagline: An unfiltered look at the fashion industry.
response.title: Where's the Respect?
